sections_cited: Section 4C of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6828 of 2022 CPs D 5668, 5785, 5788, 5789, 5790, 5899, 5900, 5901, 5902, 5903, 5904, 5905, 5906, 5907, 5910, 5911, 5912, 5913, 5914, 6861, 6905, 6906, 6907, 7157, 7228, 7544, 7545, 7546, 7589, 7813 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.13101/2023. 2. For orders on CMA No.33040/2022. 3. For hearing of CMA No.28879/2022. 4. For hearing of main case. 20.12.2024 For the Petitioners Mr. Ovais Ali Shah, Tariq Masood, Naeem Suleman, Mumtaz Chandio, Imtiaz Ali, Naveed Basharat, Abdul Rehman Adeed, Mahmood ul Hassan Muhammad Tariq. For the Respondents Barrister Syed Ahsan Ali Shah, Ameer Nausherwan Adil, Abdul Hakeem Junejo, Zeeshan Ahmed, Syed Kumail Abbasi, Asif Ali Siyal, Qaim Ali, Munawwar Ali Memon and Abdul Manan on behalf of Faheem Raza. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. It is jointly submitted that these matters pertain to Section 4C of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001 and the controversy has been decided by a Division Bench of this Court in the case of Shell Petroleum Limited vs. Federation of Pakistan & others reported as 2023 PTD 607, therefore, these petitions may be disposed of in the aforesaid terms. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in each connected file. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
